**Des Moines Township** is one of seventeen [townships](/wiki/Township_(United_States) "Township (United States)") in [Boone County](/wiki/Boone_County,_Iowa "Boone County, Iowa"), [Iowa](/wiki/Iowa "Iowa"), United States. As of the [2000 census](/wiki/United_States_Census,_2000 "United States Census, 2000"), its population was 13,758.

## Geography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Des_Moines_Township,_Boone_County,_Iowa&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Geography")]

Des Moines Township covers an area of 40.44 square miles (104.7 km2) and contains one incorporated settlement, [Boone](/wiki/Boone,_Iowa "Boone, Iowa"). According to the [USGS](/wiki/United_States_Geological_Survey "United States Geological Survey"), it contains seven cemeteries: Bass Point, Biblical College, Boone Memorial Garden, Leatham, Linwood Park, Oak Grove and Sacred Heart.

Retrieved March 16, 2026.
